response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 12+ years of proven experience across the entire tech stack. Current role at re:cinq directly demonstrates TypeScript/Node.js expertise and AI agent infrastructure development—a key requirement. Strong testing culture, architecture skills, and cloud platform experience. Minor gaps are Nest.js and specific testing framework mentions (Jest/Vitest/Playwright), but easily addressed given breadth of experience.
strengths: AI agent infrastructure experience at current role matches explicit requirement; demonstrates MCP and agentic workflow expertise
Primary stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React with recent full-time production experience and proven ability to design end-to-end features
Strong testing and quality culture; TDD practitioner with workshop/course creation background; demonstrated architectural and leadership capabilities across multiple senior roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright experience; testing background is primarily in D language frameworks and general TDD practices
Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; experience is broad Node.js/TypeScript but specific NestJS expertise unclear
Security best-practices and authentication/authorization not explicitly highlighted, though fintech and data-handling roles suggest exposure
